periodization.month: Queries API by year/month and produces monthly entities/contracts.
periodization.year: Sum of available monthly entities for the year.
periodization.mandate: Sum of monthly entities from 2023 forward.

categorization.description: Official expense type grouped by versioned regex rules.

criteria.activeEntityInPeriod: Deputy with recordsCount > 0 or amountNet > 0 in the period.
